description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a bold color scheme of black and deep red. The upper is constructed from a combination of synthetic leather and mesh, providing both durability and breathability. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue for added ankle support and comfort, with a standard criss-cross lacing system running through reinforced eyelets. The midsole is thick and sculpted, likely made from EVA foam for cushioning, and the outsole appears robust, designed for traction and stability. The overall design is modern and aggressive, suitable for urban environments and active use. No visible branding or logos are present on the exterior.
description: A modern high-top sneaker in black and red with a padded collar, thick sculpted sole, and standard criss-cross lacing. The design is bold and athletic, ideal for urban wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered black and red upper, sculpted midsole, and detailed lacing.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the padded tongue, criss-cross laces, and toe box perforations.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar color blocking and visible heel support structure.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the padded collar, heel tab, and back seam details.
